Free & Open Source

Ministry first.
Technology second.

Church Plant Toolkit handles the technical work — presentations, bulletins, newsletters, branding — so you can focus entirely on the people God has called you to reach.

↓ Download Free See What's Inside

"Unless the Lord builds the house, the builders labor in vain." — Psalm 127:1

The Challenge

Church planters wear
every hat.

You're a pastor, administrator, graphic designer, IT department, and communication team all at once. That's not sustainable — and it's not why you were called.

🎨

Brand Consistency

Every flyer, bulletin, and slide deck looks different because there's no central system holding it together.

⏱️

Repetitive Setup

Re-entering your church name, address, and contact info into every new document, tool, or template — over and over.

🔐

No Control

Volunteers and team members accidentally breaking settings or changing the look and feel of your materials.

💸

Costly Software

Separate subscriptions for design, presentations, email, streaming — it adds up fast for a church with limited budget.

The Toolkit

Every tool a church
planter needs.

One app. Every tool works together under the same roof, sharing your church's information automatically. No switching between a dozen different apps or juggling subscriptions.
📽️

Presentation & Streaming

Build and display Sunday morning slides, song lyrics, and sermon notes. Built-in streaming and recording support included.

Built In
📋

Bulletin Builder

Design and print beautiful weekly bulletins in minutes. Your church info populates automatically — just add the week's content.

Built In
✉️

Newsletter Maker

Create branded email newsletters and announcements with your church's look and feel already applied.

Built In
🎨

Default Theming

Set your colors, fonts, and logo once. Every tool in the toolkit automatically applies your brand — no design skills required.

Built In
📱

Cross-Platform

Runs on Android, iPhone, iPad, Mac, Windows, Linux, and the web. One app, every device your team uses.

All Platforms
📖

Resource Library

A built-in dictionary of church planting terms and resources to help you and your team grow in knowledge and confidence.

Built In
Master Church Profile

Set it once.
Use it everywhere.

Your Master Church Profile stores everything about your church in one place. Every tool reads from it automatically — so you never retype your address, phone number, or pastor's name again.

  • ✦ Church name, address, phone, website — pre-filled in every document
  • ✦ Your logo and brand colors applied across all tools automatically
  • ✦ Share your profile to team members' devices so everyone works from the same info
  • ✦ Lock profile fields so volunteers can't accidentally break your setup
  • ✦ Update once — changes flow through to every tool instantly
⛪ Master Church Profile
Church NameGrace Community
PastorPastor Malachi
Address123 Main St.
Phone(555) 000-1234
Primary Color■ #C9933A
Logograce_logo.png ✓
Service TimeSundays 10:00 AM
✓ Synced to 3 devices
Why Open Source

Built for the church,
by the church.

Church Plant Toolkit is free — not as a trial, not as a limited version. Fully free, forever. And because it's open source, you're not dependent on a company that could shut down or raise prices.

Always Free

No subscriptions. No per-seat pricing. No "premium" tier that locks away the features you actually need. Every church, regardless of budget, gets the full toolkit.

Community Driven

Church planters and developers around the world can contribute improvements, report bugs, and suggest features. The toolkit gets better because real church planters use it every week.

Fully Transparent

Every line of code is visible on GitHub. You know exactly what the app does with your data. No hidden analytics, no selling your church's information.

Adaptable for Your Church

Developers in your congregation can customize the toolkit for your specific context — adding tools, changing workflows, integrating with services you already use.

No Lock-In

Your data is yours. Because the project is MIT licensed, anyone can take the source code, host it themselves, or build on top of it. You'll never be stranded.

Built to Last

Closed software dies when the company shuts down. Open source software lives as long as the community cares about it — and this mission isn't going anywhere.

Control & Collaboration

Your team. Your rules.

Give your volunteers access to the tools they need — without worrying about them changing things they shouldn't. Lock what matters, share what helps.

🔒 Lock the App

Protect your brand settings, church profile, and critical configurations with a PIN or password. Volunteers can use every tool freely without accessing locked settings.

📲 Share the Profile

Send your Master Church Profile to a team member's device in seconds. They get all the right information and branding instantly — without you having to set everything up manually.

👥 Multi-Device Sync

Your media team runs presentations from one device while your admin builds the bulletin on another — both working from the same church profile, the same brand.

🛡️ Role-Based Access

Let different team members use only the tools they need. The worship leader sees the presentation tool. The administrator sees the bulletin builder. Clean and simple.

Getting Started

Up and running
in minutes.

No technical knowledge required. If you can download an app, you can use Church Plant Toolkit.

1

Download

Get the app from GitHub for your platform — Android, iPhone, Mac, Windows, or Linux.

2

Set Up Your Profile

Enter your church's name, logo, colors, and contact info once. Takes about 5 minutes.

3

Start Creating

Open any tool — bulletin, presentation, newsletter — and your church info is already there.

4

Share with Team

Send the profile to your team's devices. Everyone works from the same foundation.

Download on GitHub → Report a Bug or Request a Feature
Church Plant Toolkit

Free and open source. MIT Licensed. Built for church planters, by church planters.
